title: stellaria corei
intro: Stellaria corei, also known as Core Stitchwort, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the Caryophyllaceae family. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, soothing respiratory issues, and promoting wound healing. Stellaria corei is typically prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and it can also be used in topical applications to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
